data.title: How To Earn $500 A Month From Chevron Stock Ahead Of Q1 Earnings
data.description: The energy company Chevron Corporation (NYSE: CVX) is set to release its first-quarter earnings on May 1. Analysts project earnings of 97 cents per share, a decrease from $2.18 per share in the same period last year. The consensus forecast for Chevron's quarterly revenue is $52.7 billion, compared to $47.61 billion in the previous year. Analysts, including Paul Cheng from Scotiabank, have maintained Chevron at Sector Perform with a price target of $187, up from $168. Chevron currently offers an annual dividend yield of 3.70%, amounting to a quarterly dividend of $1.78 per share ($7.12 annually). Investors are considering leveraging the company's dividend yield for potential gains. More details are available on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Vecima Announces Q3 Fiscal 2026 Results Earnings Call Thursday, May 14, 2026 at 1 pm ET
data.description: Vecima, based in Victoria, British Columbia, has disclosed plans for a conference call and live audio webcast set for Thursday, May 14, 2026, at 1pm ET. The event aims to delve into the company's performance for Q3 Fiscal 2026.

data.title: Fortive Reports First Quarter 2026 Results
data.description: Fortive Corporation (NYSE: FTV) reported robust financial results for the initial quarter of 2026 from Everett, Wash. The company highlighted a strong beginning to the year with impressive numbers. The quarter showcased a 5% increase in core revenue, a significant 13% growth in adjusted EBITDA, and a noteworthy 25% surge in adjusted EPS. These positive results were attributed to the demand for their top-notch products and commendable progress in executing the Fortive Accelera strategy.

data.title: Hoymiles Releases 2025 Sustainability Report, Advancing High-Quality Growth Through ESG Leadership
data.description: In Hangzhou, China on April 30, 2026, Hoymiles introduced its latest 2025 Sustainability Report showcasing advancements in environmental protection, social responsibility, and corporate governance. The company has bolstered its ESG governance structure to enhance its impact.

data.title: Intercontinental Exchange Reports Record First Quarter 2026
data.description: Intercontinental Exchange (NYSE: ICE) announced record-breaking first quarter results for 2026, with net revenues reaching $3.0 billion, showing a year-over-year increase of 20%. Jeff Sprecher, the Chair and Chief Executive Officer of ICE, expressed satisfaction with these achievements, attributing them to the robustness of their diverse platform and the unwavering confidence of their worldwide clientele. Despite facing substantial macroeconomic and geopolitical instability during the quarter, ICE's vital markets and data services were relied upon more heavily by customers.
BoE Gov. Bailey: Monetary policy cannot prevent higher global energy prices from affecting UK economy and inflation.

data.title: Parker Reports Fiscal 2026 Third Quarter Results
data.description: There was a significant increase in sales with a record of $5.5 billion, leading to a record high in cash flow and adjusted earnings per share (EPS). Additionally, orders saw a notable growth of 9% during this period.

data.title: Organon Reports Results for the First Quarter Ended March 31, 2026
data.description: Organon (NYSE: OGN) released its financial report for the first quarter ending on March 31, 2026. The revenue for various segments saw changes compared to the same period in 2025. In the Women's Health category, revenue dropped by 16% to $389 million, or 19% without factoring in foreign exchange rates. General Medicines' Biosimilars revenue increased by 23% to $173 million, or 21% excluding FX. Established Brands revenue decreased by 1% to $880 million, or 7% without FX. Revenue from Other sources decreased by 15% to $18 million, or 21% without FX. Overall revenue for the first quarter of 2026 was $1.46 billion, a 4% decrease from the previous year, or 9% without factoring in FX. Note: Numbers may not total perfectly due to rounding.

data.title: Why Is Qualcomm Stock Soaring Thursday?
data.description: Shares of Qualcomm Inc. (NASDAQ: QCOM) experienced an increase in premarket trading following the release of its second-quarter results. The company reported a revenue of $10.60 billion for the quarter, slightly above the expected $10.59 billion. Adjusted earnings stood at $2.65 per share, surpassing the predicted $2.56. However, Qualcomm's outlook for the third quarter fell short of expectations, with guided adjusted earnings of $2.10 to $2.30 per share, below the estimated $2.45. Revenue for the upcoming quarter is projected to be between $9.2 billion and $10.0 billion, trailing the consensus of $10.27 billion. Qualcomm highlighted the success of its automotive segment, which has exceeded a $5 billion annual revenue run rate. For more details, refer to the complete article on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Caveman to Casanova launches nationally: a first-of-its-kind relationship app built by therapists, designed for men, and built for couples ready to actually reconnect
data.description: As of April 30, 2026, an innovative platform can be accessed on the App Store. This platform integrates various components such as an AI companion, modules created by therapists, and a couples experience that balances both meaningful and enjoyable aspects. This app offers users a unique and comprehensive solution for their needs.

data.title: KuCoin Futures Market Data Now Available on TradingView, Expanding Access to Professional-Grade Analytics
data.description: KuCoin, a trustworthy global cryptocurrency platform, recently revealed that its Futures market is now accessible to more than 100 million users on TradingView. This integration allows TradingView users to view real-time futures data and gain insights into liquidity on KuCoin. The announcement was made from Providenciales, Turks and Caicos Islands, on April 30, 2026.

data.title: SIGA to Host Business Update Call on May 7, 2026, Following Release of First-Quarter 2026 Financial Results
data.description: On April 30, 2026, SIGA Technologies, Inc. (Nasdaq: SIGA), a pharmaceutical company, revealed plans for a webcast and conference call set for May 7, 2026, at 4:30 P.M. ET. During the event, CEO Diem Nguyen and CFO Daniel Luckshire will discuss a business update. SIGA, a commercial-stage company, aims to provide insights into its operations and performance. The call is a key opportunity for investors and stakeholders to engage with management and gain valuable perspectives on the company's strategic direction.

data.title: Dragonfly Energy to Report First Quarter 2026 Financial and Operational Results on May 14, 2026
data.description: On April 30, 2026, Dragonfly Energy Holdings Corp., a leading energy storage company and manufacturer of Battle Born Batteries®, disclosed that it will unveil its financial and operational outcomes for the initial quarter concluding on March 31, 2026, subsequent to the market closure on Thursday, May 14, 2026. The report will be accompanied by a conference session on the same day at 4:30 PM Eastern Time. Dragonfly Energy is listed on Nasdaq as DFLI.

data.title: Barinthus Bio Reports First Quarter 2026 Financial Results and Updates on Corporate Developments
data.description: Barinthus Biotherapeutics plc, headquartered in Germantown, Md., released its financial report for the quarter ending March 31, 2026. Operating under the ticker symbol BRNS on NASDAQ, the company, specializing in immunology and inflammation, emphasized their aim to create treatments fostering immune tolerance and potentially curative impacts. The announcement included an update on the corporate progress of Barinthus Bio.

data.title: DT Midstream Reports Strong First Quarter 2026 Results
data.description: DT Midstream, Inc. (NYSE: DTM) revealed their financial results for the first quarter of 2026 in a recent announcement. The reported net income for this period amounted to $130 million, translating to $1.27 per diluted share. Concurrently, the Operating Earnings matched the net income at $130 million or $1.27 per diluted share. Furthermore, the company reported an Adjusted EBITDA of $308 million for the quarter.

data.title: Notice of Knight Therapeutics' First Quarter 2026 Results Conference Call
data.description: In Montreal, on April 30, 2026, Knight Therapeutics Inc., listed on the TSX as GUD, a pharmaceutical company operating across the Americas excluding the USA, announced that it will unveil its financial results for the first quarter of 2026 on Thursday, May 7, 2026, before the markets open. Post the release, a conference call and audio webcast will be conducted by Knight, inviting all concerned individuals to join.
